final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo mockup of a TikTok (Douyin) live-stream screenshot featuring a young beautiful Chinese actress resembling a celestial fairy figure (神仙姐姐).

Style/medium: photorealistic smartphone screenshot simulation, TikTok/Douyin live-stream UI overlay, candid portrait editorial style
Composition: 9:16 vertical full-frame, medium close-up shot at eye level, subject centered with live-stream UI elements framing the edges, 50mm equivalent lens
Subject: elegant young Chinese woman with delicate features, long dark hair, soft natural makeup, wearing casual-chic attire, holding up a handwritten sign with both hands at chest level, warm and welcoming smile
Scene/backdrop: indoor home or studio setting, softly blurred background with warm ambient light suggesting a cozy live-stream environment
Lighting/mood: soft frontal ring-light typical of live-stream setups, warm color temperature, bright and inviting mood
Color palette: warm skin tones as anchor, soft pastel background, Douyin red/pink UI accent colors on overlay elements
Materials/textures: smooth skin with natural highlight, matte cardboard sign surface with handwritten-style text
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" written on the sign held by the subject; Douyin live-stream UI overlay elements including viewer count, comment stream, and red heart animations along the edges
Constraints: must look like an authentic Douyin live-stream screenshot with recognizable UI chrome (top bar with live badge, bottom comment bar, floating hearts); sign text must be legible and centered on the cardboard
Avoid: blurry or illegible text on sign, distorted hands or fingers, generic stock-photo feel, over-retouched skin, watermark artifacts, mismatched UI elements
